title: BTE Germany Modpack
description: Optimizations and tools for building on BuildTheEarth.
body:
![BTE Germany Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a9933943c829f8b7ca2fdad91f45bec10cd0f602.png)


This is the official modpack of BuildTheEarth Germany.
It is designed specifically for builders on the BTE Germany server and combines performance optimizations, essential building tools, and quality-of-life improvements into a single, stable package.

If you want the smoothest possible experience while building real-world locations at a 1:1 scale, this modpack is made for you.

## What this modpack adds

**Performance & Optimization**

- Carefully selected optimization mods to improve FPS, reduce stutter, and lower memory usage
- Stable performance even in dense urban areas and large builds
- Optimized settings out of the box — no manual tweaking required

**Building & Planning Tools**

- Tools that support precise, large-scale builds and real-world accuracy
- Mods commonly used by the BTE community for efficient block placement and structure work
- Utilities that help with alignment, scale, and orientation when recreating real locations

**Quality of Life**

- Improved UI and usability for long building sessions
- Small convenience features that reduce friction while building
- Fully compatible with the BTE Germany server rules and workflow

## Why download this modpack?

✔ Official & supported – tailored specifically for BTE Germany

✔ Beginner-friendly – perfect if you’re new to Build The Earth

✔ Builder-focused – no unnecessary mods, only what actually helps

✔ Time-saving – everything you need in one download

✔ Actively used by the community – tested in real projects, not theory

Whether you’re placing your first house or working on a massive city project, this modpack gives you a smooth, focused, and reliable foundation for building Germany at a 1:1 scale in Minecraft.

## About BTE Germany

Build The Earth Germany aims to recreate the entire territory of Germany in Minecraft at a 1:1 scale, based on real-world geography and architecture. As part of the global Build The Earth project, BTE Germany is one of the largest national teams worldwide, with over 1,200 active contributors working together to bring real places to life—block by block.
